_note: Prop signatures for key components. get_site_blueprint includes these for recommended components.
HeroSimple: required: heading: string | optional: subheading, ctaText, ctaHref, align: center|left, className
HeroGradient: required: heading: string | optional: subheading, ctaText, ctaHref, className
HeroSplit: required: heading: string | optional: subheading, ctaText, ctaHref, imageSrc, imageAlt, reversed: boolean, className
HeroCentered: required: heading: string | optional: label, subheading, ctaText, ctaHref, className
HeroImageBg: required: heading: string, imageSrc: string | optional: subheading, ctaText, ctaHref, overlayOpacity: number, className
HeroFullscreen: required: heading: string | optional: subheading, ctaText, ctaHref, className
HeroMinimal: required: heading: string | optional: subheading, className
HeroWithFeatures: required: heading: string | optional: subheading, ctaText, ctaHref, features: {icon,title,description}[], className
FooterMinimal: required: businessName: string | optional: links: {label,href}[], className
FooterColumns: required: businessName: string, columns: {title,links:{label,href}[]}[] | optional: description, className
FooterGradient: required: businessName: string | optional: tagline, phone, email, address, className
StatsSection: required: stats: {value: number, label: string, suffix?, prefix?}[] | optional: className
TestimonialCard: required: quote: string, author: string | optional: role, rating: number, className
ContactSection: all optional: phone, email, address, className
CTABanner: required: heading: string, ctaText: string | optional: subheading, ctaHref, variant: filled|outlined|gradient, className
PhoneCTA: required: phone: string | optional: text, variant: button|link|banner, className
ServiceGrid: required: services: {title,description,icon?: ReactNode,price?}[] | optional: columns: 2|3|4, variant: card|minimal|bordered, className
ServiceCard: required: title: string, description: string | optional: icon: ReactNode, price, className
MapEmbed: required: query: string | optional: className, height: number
FAQSection: required: items: {question,answer}[] | optional: title, subtitle, className
BookingPrompt: all optional: heading, description, phone, ctaText, ctaHref, className
FeatureGrid: required: features: {icon?: ReactNode, title, description}[] | optional: columns: 2|3|4, className
TrustBadges: required: badges: {icon?: ReactNode, text: string}[] | optional: className
IconCard: required: icon: ReactNode, title: string, description: string | optional: className
SectionHeading: required: title: string | optional: subtitle, label, align: center|left, className
GalleryStrip: required: images: {src,alt?}[] | optional: className, direction: left|right
BeforeAfter: required: beforeSrc: string, afterSrc: string | optional: beforeLabel, afterLabel, className
TeamMemberCard: required: name: string, role: string | optional: imageSrc, bio, className
ReviewStars: required: rating: number | optional: maxStars, size: sm|md|lg, showValue: boolean, className
StepsSection: required: steps: {title,description,number?}[] | optional: className, variant: horizontal|vertical
ExperienceBadge: required: years: number | optional: label, className
BlurFade: required: children: ReactNode | optional: delay: number, className
